hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_response.filePath // .tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; case "$f" in */api-client/src/*) cd api-client && npm run format && npx tsc --noEmit ;; */mcp-server/src/*) cd mcp-server && npm run format && npx tsc --noEmit ;; */cli/*.mjs|*/cli/**/*.mjs) cd cli && npm run format ;; esac; } 2>/dev/null || true
